message:
fix(pt-core): Remove duplicate ProtectedFilter import and fix test exit codes

- Remove duplicate ProtectedFilter import (was imported at line 12 and 656)
- Fix automation_mode.rs tests to accept exit code 1 (PlanReady) for agent plan
  commands. Exit code 1 is a valid success state when candidates exist.
- Add plan_exit_codes() helper predicate to accept codes 0 (Clean) and 1 (PlanReady)

All 30 automation_mode tests and 27 e2e_plan tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
